title: Aesthetica of a Rogue Hero
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode TV anime (2012) adapting light novel volumes 1-3. The tie-in manga (Hagure Yuusha no Kichiku Bigaku) is a separate, condensed adaptation of the same light novel material, complete at 18 chapters across 3 volumes. No formally named story arcs; episode titles suggest a rough split between the early Babel/master-servant setup and the later BABEL ranking tournament, used as broad divisions here.
